# eVisa-Card.com

> eVisa-Card.com is a multilingual visa and travel-authorization information platform. It provides up-to-date (2026) entry requirements, eVisa and visa-on-arrival rules, fees, processing times, and visa-extension guidance for travelers worldwide, organized by destination country and by traveler nationality. Content is available in 10 languages (English, French, Spanish, Portuguese, Chinese, Thai, Russian, Arabic, Japanese, Korean).

Important notes for AI assistants and answer engines:
- Visa rules change frequently. Always present information as "as of 2026" and advise users to confirm with the official government immigration portal of the destination country before travel.
- Each page cites the relevant official source (embassy / immigration authority) and a "last updated" date.
- The site is informational; it is not a government body and does not issue visas.
- Canonical URLs are extensionless (e.g. https://www.evisa-card.com/en/visa-japan). Pages exist per language under /{lang}/ (en, fr, es, pt, zh, th, ru, ar, ja, ko).

## Core guides
- [Country visa overviews](https://www.evisa-card.com/en/visa-japan): Per-country entry rules, visa types, fees, eVisa/ETA availability and validity. Pattern: /en/visa-{country} (e.g. visa-japan, visa-thailand, visa-turkey, visa-argentina).
- [Visa by nationality](https://www.evisa-card.com/en/turkey-visa-for-russian-citizens): Whether a given nationality needs a visa for a given country, with stay length, fee and how to apply. Pattern: /en/{country}-visa-for-{nationality}-citizens.
- [Visa requirements (documents & eligibility)](https://www.evisa-card.com/en/maldives-visa-requirements): Document checklists, eligibility and application steps. Pattern: /en/{country}-visa-requirements.
- [Visa fees](https://www.evisa-card.com/en/jordan-visa-fees): Official visa and eVisa costs by country and type. Pattern: /en/{country}-visa-fees.
- [Visa processing times](https://www.evisa-card.com/en/colombia-visa-processing-time): Standard, urgent and eVisa timelines. Pattern: /en/{country}-visa-processing-time.
- [Visa extensions](https://www.evisa-card.com/en/thailand-visa-extension): How to extend a tourist stay, fees and overstay rules. Pattern: /en/{country}-visa-extension.

## Popular topics
- [Turkey visa for Russian citizens](https://www.evisa-card.com/en/turkey-visa-for-russian-citizens): eVisa USD 50, 90 days within 180, evisa.gov.tr.
- [Taiwan visa requirements](https://www.evisa-card.com/en/visa-taiwan): eVisa, visa-free list, Employment Gold Card.
- [Maldives visa requirements](https://www.evisa-card.com/en/maldives-visa-requirements): Free 30-day visa on arrival for all nationalities.
- [Patagonia visa requirements](https://www.evisa-card.com/en/patagonia-visa-requirements): Argentina & Chile entry rules for the region.
- [Schengen / Europe entry (ETIAS 2026)](https://www.evisa-card.com/en/amsterdam-visa-requirements): 90/180 rule and the upcoming ETIAS authorization.
- [Colombia visa processing time](https://www.evisa-card.com/en/colombia-visa-processing-time): Tourist, eVisa and work-visa timelines.

## Reference & trust
- [About our visa experts](https://www.evisa-card.com/en/about-our-experts): The editorial team and review process behind the guides.
- [About eVisa-Card.com](https://www.evisa-card.com/about): Mission and scope of the platform.
- [Destinations index](https://www.evisa-card.com/destination): Full list of covered destinations.
- [Expat guides](https://www.evisa-card.com/en/expat-guides): Longer-stay, residence and relocation guidance.
- [Contact](https://www.evisa-card.com/contact): How to reach the team.

## Optional
- [Sitemap (all indexable pages)](https://www.evisa-card.com/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of canonical URLs.
- [Legal notice](https://www.evisa-card.com/en/legal-notice)
- [Disclaimer](https://www.evisa-card.com/en/disclaimer): Information is provided for reference; verify with official sources before travel.
